title: Sneaky Blocks
description: A Minecraft mod that adds passable fake blocks, mines and doors that explode when used, and a special Fake Block.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ZYwLUTT6TcY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


This mod introduces new mechanics that allow you to create traps, false illusions, and dynamic in-game actions. With it, you can surprise other players or enhance your own maps.

> Fake Block – a normal-looking block that you can walk through, perfect for creating traps or secret passages.

> Explosive mines - place them in strategic locations to trigger explosions.

> Exploding Doors – Opening the door triggers an explosion.

> Fake Lava – a liquid that looks like lava, but is safe.

> Fake Water – a liquid that looks like Water, but has the properties of lava.

> Donate https://ko-fi.com/ksavio
